context: Tests whether the agent builds a direct scoring evaluator that follows the skill's specific patterns: requiring justification before scores, using a 1-5 scale, structuring the scoring prompt with an evidence step before the numeric score, keeping each criterion focused on a single measurable aspect, and normalizing weights.

checklist.name: Justification before score
checklist.description: The LLM scoring prompt instructs finding evidence or justification BEFORE assigning the numeric score (evidence/reasoning step appears before the score step in the prompt instructions)

checklist.name: Scale 1-5
checklist.description: Scoring uses a 1-5 scale (not 1-10 or 1-3 or any other scale) for the criteria

checklist.name: Evidence step in prompt
checklist.description: The evaluation prompt explicitly asks the LLM to find or quote specific evidence from the response for each criterion

checklist.name: Single-aspect criteria
checklist.description: Each criterion in the evaluator measures exactly one thing — no criterion description bundles multiple qualities together

checklist.name: Weight normalization
checklist.description: The code normalizes or validates that criterion weights sum to 1.0 before scoring

checklist.name: Improvement suggestion
checklist.description: The scoring prompt asks the LLM to suggest one specific improvement per criterion

checklist.name: Low temperature
checklist.description: The LLM API call uses temperature 0.3 or lower for the scoring call

checklist.name: Structured JSON output
checklist.description: The evaluation output includes per-criterion scores AND justifications (not just scores) in a structured format

checklist.name: Direct scoring approach
checklist.description: Implements direct scoring (one response rated against criteria) rather than pairwise comparison
